SUMMARY  
Constellation Software's rapidly growing Perseus Operating Group (CSI) has an outstanding opportunity for an experienced Network Engineer to help support the day-to-day operations, network security and design, and fielding of incidents as they come in, while adapting security standards and governance to the real-world challenges of a large-scale, multi-location, multi-business and multi-cultural environment. 
 
 The Position 
The Network Engineer is responsible for ensuring network connectivity and security. This position will provide on-going technical service in network support, circuit support, routing support, security monitoring, routing and switching, VLAN support and infrastructure design for the Perseus Operating Group business needs. 
 
 JOB DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES   
 Network Maintenance:  
 
 Create and maintain operational procedures and systems documentation for processes, networks, systems, and software.  
 Install and maintain network devices including firewalls, switches, wireless access points, SD-WAN, routers, circuits, gateways, etc.  
 Install server hardware and server-related peripheral devices.  
 Install and use network and server analysis and performance tools to improve overall reliability and throughput.  
 Participate in the design and review of new network environments and patching of these environments.  
 Evaluate, recommend, and implement new products to extend the reliability, responsiveness, and effective use of the network environment.  
 
 Security:  
 
 Assist in overall management of the firewalls, switches, circuits, and routing of the corporate wide area network.  
 Ensure high availability and performance of security and network environment.  
 Strong demonstrated knowledge on perimeter security like IDS/IPS, firewalls, web proxies, etc.  
 Extensive experience with VPN/IPSEC tunnels, both site-to-site and client-based.  
 
 Support:  
 
 Responsible for resolving any technical issues the business units may encounter in their normal course of business as a result of Constellation's WAN and LAN environments.  
 Troubleshoot and resolve hardware and software problems.  
 Provide third-tier network support for the various businesses.  
 Daily recording and submitting of accurate timecards.  
 Adjust work schedule to accommodate business needs.  
 Other duties and projects as required by the company.  
 
 REQUIRED EXPERIENCE  
 
 B.S. degree in IT / CS / EE or equivalent with 3 years working experience maintaining a wide area network  
 Strong knowledge of network engineering.  
 Possess basic project management skills  
 Excellent English communication skills are essential. Must be able to give and receive correct information, explain difficult information in layman's terms and maintain a customer service attitude to all levels of users. 
 Experience working in Active Directory, including security groups and overall AD structure knowledge  
 Packet Capturing  
 OSI Model Understanding  
 Experience Configuring Network Infrastructure Hardware (Switches, Routers, Load Balancers)  
 Experience Deploying and Configuring Network Security Appliances (Firewalls, IPS's, Application Layer Gateways)  
 Solid understanding of networking technologies and protocols (IP, TCP, UDP, VLANS, OSPF, BGP, Static Routing, DNS)  
 Strong demonstrated knowledge on perimeter security like IDS/IPS, Firewalls, Web Proxies, etc.  
 Extensive experience with VPN/IPSEC tunnels, both site-to-site and client-based  
 Experience supporting and troubleshooting routing issues, security rules, NAT, PAT, QOS, SSL decryption, URL filtering, threat detection, intrusion detection  
 Experience supporting and troubleshooting Wireless networks  
 Experience supporting and troubleshooting VOIP  
 Experience supporting and troubleshooting QOS  
 Experience supporting and troubleshooting VLANing, Spanning Tree, Guard Root, Trunking  
 Experienced with hardware builds, rack-mounting configuration and deployment  
 
 PREFERRED EXPERIENCE  
 
 3+ years engineering experience or equivalent industry knowledge  
 Experience supporting and troubleshooting Palo Alto Networks  
 Experience administrating, supporting and maintaining Solarwinds  
 Palo Alto, CCNA, Aruba, ClearPass, Dell certifications desirable  
 Experience supporting and troubleshooting IP networking including firewalls, IP routing, IPSEC VPNs, MPLS, SDWAN and Wireless  
 Experience supporting and troubleshooting some or all of the following: Palo Alto, Cisco, Dell, Client/Aruba switch hardware, Aruba Wireless, ClearPass  
 Supporting and implementing a Wide Area Network with over 90+ locations  
 Azure, AWS, Google, or other cloud experience  
 Scripting skills (BASH, Python, Powershell) a plus  
 
 ADDITIONAL QUALIFICATIONS  
 
 Ability to work 8:00am-5:00pm ET time zone  
 Perform 24x7 advanced tier troubleshooting, including off-hour maintenance activities, problem resolution, and on-call troubleshooting efforts during data network outages  
 Must be able to sit at a computer workstation for extended time periods and fully utilize the PC monitor, keyboard, mouse, and required programs.  
 Able to present ideas in business-friendly and user-friendly language  
 Possess strong interpersonal and communication skills  
 Capable of writing documentation  
 Possess a keen attention to detail  
 Strong customer service orientation  
 Proven analytical and problem-solving abilities  
 Highly self-motivated and directed  
 Ability to effectively prioritize and execute tasks in a high-pressure environment  
 Experience working in a process-oriented, collaborative environment

Skills: .NET, WPF, CCHANNEL
Description: Infotech seeks a skilled Software Engineer with a minimum of six years of experience to join our dynamic development team. The ideal candidate will have extensive hands-on expertise in C# and the .NET ecosystem, including .NET Framework, .NET Core, and .NET 6+. This role focuses on developing sophisticated WPF desktop applications as well as .NET web applications using ASP.NET MVC and Web API. The candidate must have a strong grasp of object-oriented programming principles, design patterns, and the architecture of enterprise-level software. Given the nature of our projects, experience with microservices, real-time systems, and low-latency applications is essential. The Software Engineer will take ownership of designing and implementing complex, event-driven, real-time data processing systems. They will also troubleshoot and resolve advanced production issues while providing thorough root-cause analysis. In addition to technical expertise, the role involves leading and mentoring a small team of two, fostering collaborative solutions and ensuring high-quality software delivery. Effective communication and solid knowledge of network programming, security protocols such as JWT and OAuth, and integration with financial systems are key to succeeding in this position. Responsibilities Develop and maintain WPF desktop applications leveraging strong skills in C# and .NET technologies. Design, develop, and deploy ASP.NET MVC and Web API applications ensuring scalability and security. Implement multithreading and parallel programming techniques using Task Parallel Library and async/await to optimize performance. Design and architect enterprise-grade applications following best practices in object-oriented programming and utilizing design patterns such as Singleton, Factory, Observer, Strategy, and CQRS. Develop and maintain network socket programming components for TCP/UDP communication. Implement service-to-service communication with gRPC and manage message brokers like RabbitMQ, Apache Qpid, or Apache Kafka. Create real-time data processing and event-driven components for low-latency systems and ensure robust integration with financial organizations and banking projects. Troubleshoot complex production issues, conduct root-cause analysis, and implement effective solutions to maintain system reliability. Design and optimize relational database schemas and write efficient SQL queries for databases including MySQL, PostgreSQL, or Oracle. Ensure secure application architecture by integrating REST security standards like JWT and OAuth. Collaborate cross-functionally with stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into technical solutions. Lead and mentor a team of two software engineers, guiding their development and fostering a productive, collaborative work environment. Maintain up-to-date knowledge of emerging technologies and apply relevant advancements to improve existing systems.

Preferred Qualifications and Benefits   - Experience in the shipping or logistics industry is a plus.   - Familiarity with cloud infrastructure and DevOps practices.   - Exposure to automation tools and workflow management systems.   - Opportunity to work in a fast-growing company with a collaborative and innovative culture.   - Chance to make a direct impact on product development and company growth. Skills: PostgreSQL, Database Development, Linux/Unix, ETL Processes, Oracle
Description:
Infotech is seeking a skilled Software Engineer specializing in Database development and administration with a strong background in PostgreSQL and Oracle databases. This role requires hands-on experience managing very large datasets and expertise in SQL performance tuning, database replication, and high-availability architectures. The successful candidate will be responsible for designing, maintaining, and optimizing complex database environments while ensuring data security and compliance with best practices. This position involves working within Linux/Unix environments and utilizing various database tools to support enterprise-level reporting and operational efficiency. Additionally, the engineer will lead a team of three database professionals, providing guidance and oversight to ensure effective collaboration and project delivery.

The ideal candidate possesses at least five years of experience in database management and development, with a deep understanding of advanced SQL queries, stored procedures, triggers, and scheduled maintenance tasks. They should have proven capabilities in backup and recovery strategies, log management, and implementing disaster recovery solutions. The role demands strong analytical skills to manage large-scale databases with millions to billions of records and optimize performance using indexing, partitioning, and execution plan analysis. The engineer will design and implement essential database installation, configuration, upgrades, and security measures to safeguard data integrity and availability.

 Responsibilities Develop, configure, and maintain PostgreSQL and Oracle database systems to support business applications and enterprise reporting. Design and implement complex SQL queries, stored procedures, functions, and triggers to optimize data retrieval and manipulation. Monitor and analyze database performance, implementing tuning strategies such as indexing, partitioning, and query optimization to enhance speed and efficiency. Manage database replication, including setup and maintenance of standby and disaster recovery environments to ensure data availability and resilience. Develop and execute robust backup, recovery, and log maintenance procedures to safeguard data integrity and support business continuity. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support ETL processes and data warehousing initiatives, ensuring seamless data integration and accuracy. Administer database security protocols, access controls, and compliance measures to protect sensitive information and maintain regulatory standards. Perform database installations, configurations, and software upgrades for PostgreSQL and Oracle systems in Linux/Unix operating environments. Lead, mentor, and manage a team of three database professionals, facilitating knowledge sharing, performance evaluations, and project coordination. Utilize database management tools such as pgAdmin and Oracle SQL Developer for monitoring, troubleshooting, and performance analysis. Ensure adherence to ACID database transaction principles to maintain consistency, reliability, and transactional integrity across all operations. Establish and support high-availability database architectures to minimize downtime and optimize system reliability. Prepare detailed documentation on database architecture, maintenance procedures, performance tuning, and disaster recovery plans. Stay current with emerging database technologies and best practices to recommend and implement improvements that drive operational excellence.

Technical Requirements Python (Imperative): Expert-level proficiency in automation, scraping (Selenium/Playwright), and AI/LLM integrations (LangChain/APIs). Salesforce Apex: Strong understanding or willingness to master Apex for high-level client projects. The "Legacy" Stack: 2+ years of professional experience in Laravel (PHP) and ASP.NET / .NET Core (C#). Databases: 3+ years with MS SQL Server and ORM systems. Frontend: Competency in Vue.js, ES6, and jQuery for rapid internal tool interfaces. DevOps Leanings: Solid understanding of server settings, cloud environments, and IT security. Description:
We are looking for a skilled Software Engineer specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning to join Infotech. The ideal candidate applies a deep understanding of machine learning algorithms and state-of-the-art AI techniques to design, develop, and deploy robust models and solutions. This role involves working extensively with large and complex real-world datasets, ensuring the highest quality outcomes by implementing rigorous model evaluation and optimization practices. The engineer collaborates across teams using Python and machine learning frameworks such as TensorFlow and Scikit-learn, while leveraging MLOps tools to streamline model deployment and lifecycle management. Given the technical breadth, this position requires at least three years of relevant experience and a strong ability to handle data processing, model tuning, and infrastructure considerations for AI/ML projects. This role does not involve team management but expects proactive engagement and individual contribution towards Infotechs AI-driven innovation goals.

The Software Engineer (AI/ML) at Infotech plays a crucial role in advancing machine learning initiatives by building scalable solutions that integrate seamlessly into production environments. Candidates must demonstrate expertise in deploying models within containerized microservices environments using technologies like Docker and Kubernetes, ensuring solutions meet performance standards related to latency, throughput, and resource utilization. A solid foundation in managing noisy and large data effectively is essential, along with proficiency in using various Python libraries such as Pandas and NumPy for data manipulation. The successful engineer will operate within an agile setting, applying expert knowledge of supervised and unsupervised learning, deep learning architectures including convolutional and recurrent neural networks, transformer models, and ensemble methods. Their contributions will also include establishing effective backup, recovery, and log management procedures to maintain high system reliability and robustness.

 Responsibilities Design, develop, and implement machine learning models using suitable algorithms such as classification, regression, clustering, tree-based, and ensemble methods. Perform data processing and feature engineering on large and noisy datasets utilizing frameworks like Pandas, NumPy, and Spark. Develop and maintain scalable deep learning models including CNNs, RNNs, and Transformer architectures. Optimize machine learning models for production by focusing on latency, throughput, and effective resource utilization. Leveraging advanced AI technology, Motive delivers comprehensive visibility and control while significantly reducing manual workloads through automation and simplification of complex tasks. Serving nearly 100,000 customers—from Fortune 500 companies to small businesses—across diverse industries such as transportation, logistics, construction, energy, manufacturing, agriculture, food and beverage, retail, and the public sector, Motive is at the forefront of operational technology. This position offers a unique opportunity to apply your deep expertise in frontend technologies while mentoring junior developers and leading by example to produce high-quality software. You will be responsible for driving architectural improvements, ensuring the tech stack remains current, conducting thorough code reviews, and participating actively in the recruitment process to attract top engineering talent. Preferred Qualifications and Benefits - Experience working in Agile development environments and using CI/CD pipelines.   - Knowledge of backend technologies and RESTful API integration.   - Familiarity with testing frameworks and writing automated tests for frontend applications.   - Passion for continuous learning and professional growth.   - Opportunity to work in a fast-paced, innovative company with a diverse and inclusive culture.   - Competitive compensation and benefits package.   - Chance to contribute to products that impact thousands of customers and industries worldwide. Joining Motive means becoming part of a dynamic team dedicated to transforming how physical operations are managed through cutting-edge technology. If you are a motivated senior frontend engineer looking to make a significant impact, this role offers an exciting platform to grow your career and influence the future of fleet management solutions.

Description:
Stack Edge Digital is seeking a motivated Cold Caller to join our sales team. In this role, you will be responsible for initiating contact with potential clients through outbound calls, introducing our products and services, and setting appointments to generate new business opportunities. The ideal candidate has at least one year of experience in cold calling or a similar sales environment, demonstrates excellent product knowledge, and uses effective time management to maximize call productivity. Although this position does not involve managing a team, collaboration with other sales team members and marketing departments is essential to ensure alignment with company goals and sales strategies.

As a Cold Caller at Stack Edge Digital, you will employ advanced cold calling techniques and leverage sales automation tools to efficiently manage leads and maintain a healthy sales pipeline. Your proactive approach and result-driven mindset will contribute directly to the growth of our customer base. You are expected to consistently achieve appointment setting targets and support the sales process by qualifying leads and nurturing prospects to conversion. This role requires excellent communication skills, persistence, and the ability to handle objections professionally while maintaining a positive company image.

 Responsibilities Make outbound calls to prospective customers using cold calling techniques to introduce products and services. Effectively manage time to maximize the number of calls made and appointments set each day. Generate and qualify leads by identifying potential customer needs and interest in company offerings. Set appointments for the sales team to follow up and close deals, ensuring a smooth transition. Utilize sales automation tools and customer relationship management systems to track and manage leads and sales pipeline. Maintain accurate records of calls made, appointments set, and customer interactions for reporting and analysis. Continuously update product knowledge to provide accurate information and answer customer inquiries confidently. Handle objections and rejections professionally with persistence and a positive attitude. Collaborate with the marketing and sales departments to align outreach strategies with promotional campaigns and company goals. Monitor and report on performance metrics to identify areas for improvement in cold calling effectiveness. Follow company policies and industry standards to ensure compliance and protect brand reputation. Adapt calling scripts and approaches based on customer feedback and evolving market conditions.

Skills: LINUX, Server Administration, AWS, DOCKER, Terraform, CloudWatch, Gitlab CI, CI/CD pipelines, DevOps Tools, Nginx
Description:
Sopify AI is seeking a skilled DevOps Engineer with at least three years of hands-on production experience managing AWS-based cloud environments. This role demands expertise in building and maintaining continuous integration and continuous deployment pipelines, as well as deploying applications to staging and production environments. The ideal candidate demonstrates strong proficiency in AWS, Docker, GitLab CI, Linux, CloudWatch, Terraform, Nginx, and server administration tools, allowing them to effectively manage cloud infrastructure and ensure high availability and performance of the company’s applications. This is a full-time position requiring availability during agreed working hours and commitment to the responsibilities without engagement in other full-time employment.

The DevOps Engineer at Sopify AI plays a vital part in bridging development and operations by automating workflows and maintaining infrastructure with precision. This role requires excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, as well as comfort in providing weekly live infrastructure demonstrations, maintaining comprehensive documentation, and delivering written progress reports. The successful candidate embraces ownership and accountability, working closely with the startup founder in a fast-paced, dynamic environment. While team management is not part of the role, the candidate will be expected to collaborate effectively and contribute meaningfully to the company’s growth through robust DevOps practices.

 Responsibilities 
 Design, deploy, and manage scalable and secure AWS cloud infrastructure that supports the company’s applications and services. 
 Develop, maintain, and optimize continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines using GitLab CI or similar tools. 
 Manage containerized applications using Docker and orchestrate deployments to staging and production environments. 
 Monitor cloud infrastructure performance and health using AWS CloudWatch and other monitoring tools to ensure system reliability and availability. 
 Implement automation scripts and infrastructure as code using Terraform to provision and configure cloud resources efficiently. 
 Ensure server security, stability, and performance through effective Linux server administration and regular patch management. 
 Configure and manage web servers such as Nginx to optimize application delivery and load balancing. 
 Collaborate with the development team and startup founder to understand deployment requirements and troubleshoot issues in live environments. 
 Prepare and deliver weekly infrastructure demonstrations that provide insights into system status, changes, and deployment progress. 
 Maintain up-to-date, comprehensive infrastructure documentation including architecture diagrams, deployment processes, and operational guides. 
 Coordinate with other stakeholders to implement best practices in DevOps, security, and cloud infrastructure management. 
 Take full ownership of the cloud infrastructure lifecycle, ensuring accountability for uptime, backups, scalability, and disaster recovery. 
 Continuously research and implement improvements to the infrastructure and DevOps processes to support the company’s evolving needs. 
 
 Weekly Expectations (Non-Negotiable) 
 To ensure transparency and velocity, the following are required: 
 1. Weekly Live Infrastructure Demo 
 Every week you will: 
 
 
 Screen share live 
 
 
 Demonstrate deployments 
 
 
 Show CI/CD changes 
 
 
 Review monitoring dashboards 
 
 
 Review logs 
 
 
 Explain improvements made 
 
 
 Highlight risks 
 
 
 No written-only updates. 
 2. Weekly Infrastructure Report 
 You will submit a structured weekly report including: 
 
 
 What was completed 
 
 
 What was improved 
 
 
 What broke and how it was fixed 
 
 
 Cloud cost changes 
 
 
 Security considerations 
 
 
 Planned work for next week 
 
 
 3. Infrastructure Documentation 
 You will maintain: 
 
 
 Updated infrastructure diagram 
 
 
 Deployment flow documentation 
 
 
 Environment variable management documentation 
 
 
 Disaster recovery notes 
 
 
 Documentation must stay current. 
 Technical Requirements 
 You should have: 
 
 
 2–4 years experience in DevOps or Cloud Engineering 
 
 
 Strong AWS experience (EC2, S3, IAM, Lambda preferred) 
 
 
 Experience with GCP is a plus 
 
 
 Docker experience (required) 
 
 
 CI/CD experience (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or similar) 
 
 
 Linux server management 
 
 
 Monitoring tools (Datadog, Prometheus, CloudWatch, etc.) 
 
 
 Basic security best practices knowledge 
 
 
 Bonus: 
 
 
 Terraform or Infrastructure-as-Code 
 
 
 Kubernetes exposure 
 
 
 Startup experience 
 
 
 What We’re Looking For 
 We want someone who: 
 
 
 Moves fast 
 
 
 Takes ownership without being told 
 
 
 Communicates clearly 
 
 
 Flags risks early 
 
 
 Is comfortable being accountable 
 
 
 Wants long-term growth 
 
 
 We do not want someone who: 
 
 
 Waits for detailed instructions 
 
 
 Disappears during production issues 
 
 
 Juggles multiple full-time jobs 
 
 
 Avoids visibility 
 
 
 Performance Expectations 
 In your first 30 days, we expect: 
 
 
 Clean CI/CD pipeline documentation 
 
 
 Production deployment stability 
 
 
 Monitoring fully configured 
 
 
 Infrastructure diagram delivered 
 
 
 At least one cost optimization initiative 
 
 
 In 90 days: 
 
 
 Deployment time reduced 
 
 
 Cloud cost efficiency improved 
 
 
 Clear observability in place 
 
 
 Security checklist implemented

Description: Careem is on a mission to build the Everything App for the greater Middle East, aiming to simplify daily life through seamless transportation, food and grocery ordering, payment management, and more. Since its inception in 2012, Careem has empowered over 2.5 million Captains to earn, served more than 70 million customers, and created a thriving platform for the region’s top talent and entrepreneurs. Operating in over 70 cities across 10 countries from Morocco to Pakistan, Careem is now entering a new era driven by artificial intelligence. The company is seeking curious and innovative AI professionals who can harness AI to develop impactful tools, automate workflows, and enhance operational efficiency, customer experience, and internal systems. Key Responsibilities:   - Own, design, and maintain internal FinOps tools for monitoring, forecasting, and reporting AWS cloud costs.   - Collaborate with engineering teams to implement cost visibility and governance aligned with AWS budgets.   - Develop and maintain anomaly detection systems to identify unusual cost patterns early, ensuring payment corresponds to actual usage.   - Automate data collection pipelines and cost analytics workflows using AWS services such as Athena, Glue, QuickSight, and S3.   - Continuously improve cost monitoring dashboards to enhance data reliability and coverage.   - Work closely with internal teams to enforce governance and budgeting policies through automation and alerting mechanisms.   - Participate in on-call rotations to ensure the reliability and availability of FinOps tools and systems. This role presents an exciting opportunity to contribute to a fast-growing platform at the forefront of AI-driven innovation. By optimizing cloud infrastructure costs, you will support Careem’s broader mission to simplify and improve lives across the Middle East.

Skills: Mobile App Development, React Native, Expo and EAS Build/Update workflows
Description:
Genie Technologies is seeking a skilled React Native Developer with a minimum of three years of experience to join our dynamic mobile development team. The ideal candidate specializes in building and maintaining high-quality iOS and Android applications using React Native and Expo tools. You will play a key role in developing seamless, user-friendly mobile applications by implementing modern navigation patterns, integrating APIs, and enhancing app features such as push notifications and offline capabilities. This position does not require managing a team but involves close collaboration with product managers, designers, and backend developers to deliver exceptional app experiences.

The successful developer will have a strong background in mobile app development and be proficient with Expo and EAS build and update workflows. You will be responsible for writing clean, maintainable code and improving existing codebases while ensuring optimal application performance and usability. The role demands a solid understanding of integrating REST and GraphQL APIs, and familiarity with Supabase or custom Node.js backends is essential. This opportunity allows you to contribute directly to the core mobile experience of Genie Technologies products and innovate within the fast-evolving mobile ecosystem.

 Responsibilities Develop and maintain responsive iOS and Android mobile applications using React Native and Expo frameworks. Implement intuitive navigation patterns utilizing Expo Router and React Navigation to enhance user experience. Integrate RESTful and GraphQL APIs from Supabase or custom Node.js backend services to support app functionality. Implement advanced mobile features such as push notifications, deep linking, and offline data handling to improve app engagement and usability. Collaborate with cross-functional teams including designers, backend engineers, and product managers to deliver high-quality mobile solutions. Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code following best practices and company coding standards. Conduct rigorous testing and debugging to ensure application stability and reliability across multiple devices and platforms. Participate in code reviews and provide constructive feedback to peers to maintain code quality and consistency. Stay updated with the latest industry trends, tools, and technologies related to React Native and mobile app development. Utilize Expo and EAS build and update workflows to streamline the application build process and facilitate seamless app deployment and updates. Optimize app performance and troubleshoot issues to ensure smooth user interactions. Document development processes, architectures, and configurations for ease of maintenance and future improvements.

Skills: Customer Relationship Management, Mobile Phone Industry, Product Knowledge, Lead Generation, credit/loan
Description:

This role requires a professional with solid experience in the mobile phone market, specifically in onboarding shops or selling mobile phones. The ideal candidate has strong customer relationship management skills and can actively generate leads while demonstrating excellent product knowledge. This position does not involve managing a team but requires an individual who operates independently and collaborates effectively with various stakeholders to achieve sales targets and promote mobile phone products successfully.

The Sales Officer / Promoter will engage directly with customers to provide comprehensive information about available mobile phone products and related financial options, such as credit or loan services. This role demands an energetic and proactive individual capable of understanding customer needs, presenting product benefits clearly, and encouraging sales growth in a competitive market. Working with Palmpay Pvt Ltd, the professional will contribute to expanding the company’s presence in the mobile phone industry by ensuring a positive customer experience and building long-lasting relationships with onboarded shops and customers alike.

Description: Confidential Company is seeking a diligent Market Researcher / Interviewer with a minimum of one year of experience to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate is a graduate or possesses strong written English skills with excellent grammar, spelling, and sentence structure. This role demands a friendly and confident individual with a neutral accent who enjoys communication and engaging with diverse groups of people. The candidate must be comfortable traveling within the city to various commercial locations such as malls, brand spaces, and public areas to conduct market research interviews and focus groups. The successful Market Researcher / Interviewer plays a critical role in collecting and analyzing valuable consumer insights to guide business strategies. While this position does not involve managing a team, it requires sharp observation skills, effective use of mobile data collection tools, and the ability to deliver accurate reports. Strong interpersonal skills and the capacity to work independently in the field are essential. This position offers an excellent opportunity for those who enjoy interaction and contributing to data-driven market decision-making. Responsibilities Conduct face-to-face interviews, focus groups, and panel discussions with the public at various commercial locations within the city. Approach individuals confidently and professionally to explain research objectives and obtain participation consent. Utilize mobile data collection tools and techniques to accurately record responses and input data into research systems. Keep detailed records of interview responses by completing questionnaires, making audio or visual recordings, or entering information into digital platforms. Collect and manage research materials left with interviewees and engage in follow-up discussions when necessary to clarify responses. Observe participant behavior and environments carefully to identify trends and insights that enhance data quality. Review and collate the collected data regularly, ensuring all information meets quality assurance standards. Write clear, concise, and well-structured reports summarizing data findings and project progress for management and stakeholders. Maintain a professional appearance and demeanor while representing the company in public and commercial settings. Travel independently to different locations as assigned to maximize data collection reach and efficiency. Follow all organizational protocols and ethical guidelines related to data privacy and interviewee confidentiality. Continuously improve data collection methods and share feedback to enhance overall research effectiveness.

Description: We are looking for an experienced ASO (App Store Optimization) Specialist with strong expertise in optimizing apps for both the Apple App Store and Google Play Store. Write high-converting, natural-language titles, subtitles, descriptions, and metadata that comply with current algorithm requirements while avoiding keyword stuffing. - Optimize conversion rates by creating and managing Custom Product Pages (iOS) and Custom Store Listings (Google Play) tailored to specific audiences and intents. - Conduct thorough competitor analysis covering rankings, creatives, pricing, review trends, update frequency, and in-app event strategies. - Plan and execute app launches, relaunches, seasonal campaigns, and major updates to maintain ranking momentum. - Identify emerging trends, seasonal opportunities, niche audience segments, and post-install behavior signals to maximize visibility and downloads. - Drive performance in Top Charts, Search Rankings, Featured placements, and in-app event/promotional surfaces. - Understand the interplay between paid user acquisition and organic growth, including ranking velocity and retention signals. - Manage ratings and reviews, monitor reputation, and implement proactive user feedback strategies to strengthen store signals. - Ensure compliance with store policies, resolve metadata rejections, adapt to guideline changes, and quickly address issues. - Collaborate closely with design, marketing, product, development, and user acquisition teams to support integrated growth initiatives. - Deliver measurable, KPI-driven results such as install volume, retention improvements, revenue impact, and ranking gains within tight deadlines. Required Qualifications - Extensive experience in ASO for both Apple App Store and Google Play Store. - Proven success in driving significant organic growth through data-driven strategies. - Advanced skills in keyword research, semantic clustering, and user intent analysis. - Strong expertise in conversion rate optimization and creative testing. - Hands-on experience with A/B and multivariate testing of store creatives. - Proficiency with ASO and analytics tools including App Store Connect, Google Play Console, Firebase, Sensor Tower, and similar platforms. - Solid understanding of the relationship between paid and organic growth. - Excellent collaboration and communication skills for cross-functional teamwork. - Ability to manage multiple priorities and deliver results under tight deadlines. Preferred Qualifications and Benefits - Experience with global ASO, including localization and cultural adaptation. - Strong analytical skills to identify emerging trends and niche opportunities. - Proven track record managing app launches, seasonal campaigns, and update strategies. - Familiarity with reputation management and user feedback optimization. - On-site work environment to facilitate close collaboration with internal teams. This role offers the chance to lead impactful ASO initiatives that drive sustained app growth and visibility in highly competitive markets. If you are passionate about combining data analysis and creative strategies to optimize app store performance, we encourage you to apply.

Skills: Cloud Computing  Knowledge, Cloud Storage, Enterprise IT Infrastructure, OEMs
Description:
Job Summary 
 We are seeking an experienced Enterprise Storage and Backup Expert responsible for managing, maintaining, and optimizing enterprise storage and backup infrastructure. The role ensures high availability, performance, data protection, disaster recovery readiness, and operational excellence across mission-critical systems. 
 Key Responsibilities – Storage Administration 
 • Administer and manage enterprise storage platforms (SAN, NAS, Object Storage). • Configure and manage storage arrays such as HPE 3PAR/Primera, NetApp, Dell EMC, or equivalent. • Provision storage (LUNs, volumes), zoning, masking, and multipathing. • Monitor storage performance, utilization, and capacity planning. • Perform storage troubleshooting, root cause analysis (RCA), and performance tuning. • Manage replication, snapshots, cloning, and disaster recovery configurations. • Support storage migration, upgrades, and hardware lifecycle activities. 
 Key Responsibilities – Backup & Recovery 
 • Administer backup solutions such as Commvault, Veritas NetBackup, Veeam, Rubrik, or Cohesity. • Define and manage backup policies, retention, scheduling, and recovery procedures. • Perform backup validation and restoration testing. • Troubleshoot backup failures and optimize backup performance. • Ensure compliance with RPO and RTO requirements. • Support disaster recovery testing and planning. 
 Operating Systems & Platform Support 
 • Manage storage integration with Linux (RHEL, Oracle Linux, SUSE) and Windows environments. • Support NFS, CIFS/SMB, Fibre Channel, and iSCSI protocols. • Support storage requirements for databases (Oracle, Cassandra, PostgreSQL, MongoDB). • Support daily administration on the underlying infrastructure/hardware/system. • Support VMware, OpenShift, K8, Hyper-V, and container platforms. 
 Monitoring, Automation & Security 
 • Monitor storage and backup systems using enterprise monitoring tools. • Automate operational tasks using Shell scripting, PowerShell, or Ansible. • Ensure storage security, encryption, and ransomware protection. • Maintain operational documentation, SOPs, and architecture diagrams. 
 Qualifications & Experience 
 • 5–10 years of experience in enterprise storage and backup administration. • Strong hands-on experience with enterprise storage platforms (HPE preferred). • Experience in hardware management & understanding. • Strong vendor management skills. • Experience with enterprise backup solutions. • Strong troubleshooting and analytical skills. • Experience in production and mission-critical environments. 
 Preferred Skills 
 • OEM certifications (HPE, NetApp, Dell EMC). • ITIL certification. • Experience with cloud storage (AWS, Azure). • Experience supporting large-scale enterprise infrastructure. 
 Soft Skills 
 • Strong problem-solving and analytical skills. • Ability to work in a pressure environment. • Excellent communication and documentation skills. • Ability to work independently and in team environments. • Ability to work in 24x7 support environments when required.

Skills: Microservices Architecture, DOCKER, Kubernetes, AWS Lambda, Cloud Services Integration
Description:
Agay Barho is seeking a Senior Golang Engineer to join the team focused on building next-generation AI automation systems that replace entire workflows with intelligent agents. This role is ideal for a backend engineer with a strong operational mindset who designs and builds high-performance backend systems in Go. The engineer will be responsible for architecting AI automation pipelines, developing scalable microservices, and creating automation systems that eliminate manual workflow steps. This position offers significant ownership and the opportunity to work on large-scale production systems, job automation pipelines, and optionally graph-based knowledge systems, within a cutting-edge technology environment.

The ideal candidate has at least five years of experience building production systems in Golang and a deep understanding of microservices architecture, distributed systems, concurrency, and cloud services integration such as AWS Lambda. They excel at designing asynchronous, event-driven systems with scalable queue-based architectures that handle thousands of tasks per day. Familiarity with AI and automation technologies, including large language model APIs, retrieval-augmented generation pipelines, and decision-layer orchestration, is essential. The role calls for a proactive engineer who delivers reliable, observable systems while continuously seeking to automate workflows and scale operations efficiently. This position does not currently involve managing a team but requires strong ownership and system-level thinking.

 Responsibilities Design and develop scalable backend systems utilizing Golang to support high-throughput microservices and distributed asynchronous workloads. Architect and implement AI automation pipelines integrating large language models, tool-usage workflows, memory management, and decision logic to replace manual workflows effectively. Build and maintain automation systems for tasks such as lead generation, web scraping, and job application engines, ensuring they operate continuously and handle high volumes of actions reliably. Design event-driven systems based on queuing, pub/sub, and worker architectures to handle large-scale asynchronous operations with scalability and fault tolerance. Integrate backend services with external APIs, scraping systems, and third-party platforms, ensuring seamless data flow and operational reliability. Develop reliable anti-detection scraping mechanisms employing proxies, rate limiting, retries, and backoff strategies to conduct large-scale web scraping tasks without detection. Ensure backend system performance, availability, and observability through effective monitoring, logging, and alerting tools and techniques. Define and document API schemas and integration patterns to promote consistent communication protocols across microservices and client-facing interfaces. Utilize cloud services such as AWS Lambda and manage containerized deployments with Docker and Kubernetes to ensure flexible and scalable infrastructure. Collaborate on optionally integrating graph-based knowledge systems utilizing databases like Neo4j or Dgraph to enhance data relationships and querying capabilities. Continuously analyze existing workflows with the goal of identifying automation opportunities and eliminating manual processes wherever feasible. Adopt a systems-thinking approach to engineering problems, focusing beyond individual features toward scalable, maintainable, and reusable solutions. Engage with AI and automation frameworks, including working with LLM APIs, retrieval-augmented generation pipelines, agent orchestration systems, and workflow automation tools to deliver innovative solutions. Lead developments that embody an automation-first mindset, aiming to remove human intervention from routine workflows by designing robust and scalable systems. Maintain thorough knowledge of concurrency patterns in Golang including goroutines, channels, and worker pools to maximize system throughput and reliability. Contribute to engineering and documentation best practices by sharing knowledge about system components, integration patterns, and performance optimizations.

Job Purpose:   
 We are seeking a detail-oriented and technically proficient IFRS 9 Analyst to play a critical role in the operational execution and monitoring of our Expected Credit Loss (ECL) framework.  Bachelor’s degree in finance, Accounting, Economics, Mathematics, Statistics, Actuaries, or a related quantitative field. 
 3-6 years of hands on experience in an IFRS 9 ECL reporting, credit risk analytics, executing PD, LGD, and EAD models within a banking or financial services environment. 
 Advanced skills in Microsoft Excel; experience with VBA, Python, or R, is highly desirable.

Skills: OpenCL, Algorithm Design, Python, CPLUSPLUS, GPU Architecture
Description:
Agay Barho is seeking a highly skilled GPU Engineer to lead the performance and scalability efforts of its real-time image processing pipeline. This role involves owning and optimizing the throughput of hardware platforms such as NVIDIA Jetson Orin and x86 discrete GPUs, ensuring that high-frame-rate data streams operate without any frame drops or latency delays. The ideal candidate brings over five years of deep expertise in performance-critical Modern C++ programming and CUDA architecture, coupled with a strong foundation in algorithm design and embedded system optimization. As the GPU Engineer, you will manage a dedicated team of five professionals, driving technical excellence in kernel development, bottleneck elimination, and hardware-aware tuning to push GPU hardware to its maximum potential.

In this position, you will design, implement, and tune custom CUDA or Triton kernels to meet demanding performance goals. You will perform comprehensive bottleneck analysis using advanced NVIDIA profiling tools, develop efficient data movement strategies to minimize host-to-device lag, and restructure algorithms to leverage specific GPU architectures effectively. Your responsibilities will extend to optimizing mathematical throughput for inference applications by leveraging high-performance libraries like TensorRT, cuBLAS, cuFFT, and Thrust without compromising precision. The role also benefits from experience with computer vision geometry, motion capture technologies, and device driver knowledge, which will enhance the overall robustness and synchronization of sensor data streams across multiple GPUs.

 Responsibilities Design, develop, and optimize low-level CUDA or Triton kernels for real-time image processing tasks requiring high throughput and low latency. Conduct in-depth bottleneck analysis using NVIDIA Nsight Systems, Nsight Compute, nvprof, and other profiling tools to identify and eliminate performance stalls related to memory bandwidth, kernel launches, and warp occupancy. Architect and implement efficient memory orchestration strategies including zero-copy, unified memory, and pinned memory to minimize host-to-device latency and ensure seamless data flow. Adapt and restructure algorithms to align with hardware architectures such as NVIDIA Ampere and Hopper, optimizing register pressure, cache utilization, and parallel computation efficiency. Utilize and integrate high-performance mathematical and inference libraries such as TensorRT, cuBLAS, cuFFT, and Thrust to maximize computational throughput while maintaining accuracy. Manage a team of five GPU engineers, providing technical guidance, task prioritization, and mentorship to drive continuous performance improvements and innovation. Apply strong linear algebra and parallel algorithm knowledge to develop efficient reduction, prefix sum, and other parallel processing methods tailored for GPU execution. Optimize workloads specifically for embedded environments like Linux for Tegra (L4T) and other resource-constrained platforms, ensuring robust performance under strict hardware limits. Leverage knowledge of computer vision geometry including camera intrinsics, lens distortion, and 3D triangulation to assist in advanced image processing and sensor fusion tasks. Incorporate motion capture expertise such as sub-pixel centroid extraction and high-speed marker tracking to enhance the precision and reliability of tracking systems. Work with camera drivers including GMSL2, MIPI, and V4L2 capture pipelines to support video input at the hardware level, ensuring compatibility and performance stability. Develop synchronization logic to coordinate hardware-level frame capture across multiple GPUs and sensors, maintaining consistent timing and data integrity in real-time workflows.

Description: We are seeking a skilled Data Migration & E-Commerce Specialist to lead the transition of our platform from BigCommerce Enterprise to BigCommerce B2B Edition. This critical role focuses on ensuring data accuracy, platform stability, and seamless B2B functionality throughout the migration process. The specialist will be responsible for testing essential e-commerce workflows and working closely with internal teams and technical stakeholders to deliver a smooth and successful platform upgrade. Key Responsibilities Platform & Data Cloning:   Clone the existing website theme into the BigCommerce B2B sandbox environment and configure B2B email templates. Migrate products, brands, and categories to the new platform while testing and validating the impact of product version migration on cloned listings. Data Cleansing & Preparation:   Clean, normalize, and group account data into accurate company records. De-duplicate and standardize customer and address information to build final datasets for companies, addresses, and sales staff assignments. Data Imports & Auditing:   Import company, address, and sales staff datasets into the B2B system. Conduct thorough audits of imported data to ensure completeness, consistency, and accuracy. Identify and resolve any discrepancies or migration issues promptly. Functional Testing:   Test critical user workflows including sign-in, product browsing, and checkout processes. Validate customer order history visibility and permissions, new product creation, live listing workflows, distributor quote flows, and restricted ordering logic. Project Coordination & Documentation:   Adhere to the migration project plan and meet deadlines. Document processes, test cases, results, and progress updates. Collaborate effectively with stakeholders, developers, and technical teams to ensure alignment and transparency. Required Qualifications Education:   Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, Data Management, E-Commerce, or a related discipline. Experience:   5 to 7 years of experience in data migration, e-commerce operations, or system integrations. Proven ability to manage large datasets and support platform migrations or re-platforming projects. Technical Skills:   Advanced proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets, including formulas, normalization, de-duplication, and grouping techniques. Strong SQL and database querying skills for reporting and validation purposes. Scripting knowledge in Python and/or JavaScript to support automation and API integration. Deep understanding of data import/export and validation processes. Soft Skills:   Excellent organizational and task-tracking abilities. Strong written and verbal communication skills in English. High attention to detail with a strong commitment to data accuracy. Ability to collaborate effectively across both technical and business teams. Preferred Qualifications and Benefits Experience with BigCommerce, especially the B2B Edition, is highly desirable. Familiarity with e-commerce data structures and REST API integration will be advantageous. Knowledge of BigCommerce Stencil themes, including CSS and JavaScript assets, is a plus. This is a full-time, in-person position offering a competitive monthly salary within the range of Rs150,000 to Rs170,000. The ideal candidate will be proactive, detail-oriented, and capable of managing complex data migration tasks while ensuring an exceptional e-commerce experience for B2B customers.

Description:
Riphah International University is seeking an experienced Executive - Examination to oversee and coordinate examination activities ensuring smooth operation and regulatory compliance. This role involves detailed planning, scheduling, and administration of exams, managing candidate communication, and maintaining accurate records in line with institutional and regulatory requirements. The ideal candidate has solid skills in examination planning, regulatory frameworks, data analysis, and reporting tools, with the ability to leverage artificial intelligence tools to enhance examination processes. The Executive - Examination works closely with academic and administrative departments to uphold examination standards and facilitate seamless execution of exam-related activities.

This role requires a professional with a minimum of three years of relevant experience and proficiency in managing detailed examination schedules, examination venue arrangements, and secure handling of examination materials. While this position does not include team management responsibilities, it demands strong organizational, communication, and problem-solving skills to handle multiple tasks simultaneously. The Executive ensures compliance with regulatory bodies such as HEC, PEC, PPC, and PMDC, performs process improvements, and supports data-driven decision making through robust data analysis and reporting using tools such as Microsoft Excel, SQL, and Tableau.  Responsibilities Coordinate and communicate examination activities effectively to all stakeholders, ensuring clear and timely information flow. Develop and manage examination schedules, prepare official notices, and maintain comprehensive exam records and documentation systematically. Oversee catalog maintenance and manage issuance of registration numbers to candidates in compliance with university and regulatory guidelines. Collect, compile, and verify examination data and reports using data analysis tools to ensure accuracy and completeness for regulatory submission and internal review. Maintain the examination calendar, ensuring all exams are scheduled and conducted following regulatory standards set by governing bodies such as HEC, PEC, PPC, and PMDC. Design detailed seating plans, coordinate the arrangement of exam venues, and ensure secure distribution and collection of exam papers and materials to prevent integrity breaches. Ensure all examination processes comply with relevant regulatory frameworks including data privacy and security standards. Implement process improvements and utilize artificial intelligence tools to streamline examination management and increase efficiency. Prepare reports and dashboards for examination outcomes and operational performance using reporting software such as Tableau, Power BI, or Crystal Reports. Manage document workflows and archival in document management systems to maintain an organized and accessible repository of exam-related documentation. Support the integration and use of applicant tracking systems, candidate relationship management software, and email automation tools to enhance candidate communication and operational efficiency. Perform any additional tasks or duties assigned by higher authorities to support examination and administrative functions.
